overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a walk along an elevated glass walkway surrounded by neon-lit skyscrapers and holographic koi fish at night, transitioning to a sunset scene showcasing a futuristic sports car in an urban plaza with elevated highways.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with holographic displays

events.description: large holographic koi fish appear swimming overhead between the buildings
camera begins ascending a curved spiral ramp on the walkway
camera tilts upward toward the sky between skyscrapers before cutting to black

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated glass walkway, observing the holographic koi and surrounding neon architecture

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic elevated walkway with reflective glass surfaces winding between towering cyberpunk skyscrapers. Neon-lit billboards and a distinctive yellow glass tower dominate the skyline. Giant holographic koi fish swim overhead through the canyon of buildings as pedestrians walk along the path. The camera follows the curved ramp upward, passing other pedestrians before tilting toward the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with parked vehicle at sunset

events.description: abrupt cut from night walkway to ground-level urban plaza at sunset with futuristic vehicle
camera begins panning around the sports car to reveal the surrounding plaza and highway

agents.ego_description: observing the futuristic sports car and examining the details of the urban plaza environment

entered.detail: sleek black cyberpunk sports car with angular design, illuminated rear vents, and reflective surfaces
multi-level concrete highway overpass with moving traffic and support pillars
scattered cardboard boxes and wooden pallets on the wet pavement
deep orange and yellow gradient sky indicating dusk with warm ambient lighting

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a gritty urban plaza at sunset, featuring a sleek black futuristic sports car parked on concrete. The warm orange sky contrasts with the previous neon night scene. Cardboard debris litters the ground near the vehicle while an elevated highway looms in the background. The camera pans around the car, showcasing its cyberpunk design against the backdrop of the setting sun and urban infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a neon-drenched nocturnal cityscape into a gritty urban plaza bathed in the warm glow of sunset. It begins on a winding, reflective glass walkway where the camera glides upward between towering skyscrapers and glowing billboards, passing pedestrians beneath giant holographic koi fish swimming through the air. As the camera tilts toward the sky, the vibrant neon night shifts into a deep orange twilight, opening up into a concrete plaza. The scene then expands to reveal a sleek black futuristic sports car parked amidst scattered cardboard debris, with an elevated highway looming in the background. Finally, the camera pans around the vehicle, contrasting its polished cyberpunk design against the fading light of the setting sun and the surrounding urban infrastructure.
